subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God that, whereas Moses the Interlocutor beheld the Face of Guidance, which hath no beginning, in the Fire of the Tree neither of the East nor of the West [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد خدا را که اگر موسی کلیم طلعه هدایت لابدایه را از نار شجره لاشرقیه و
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
